case_title: SOHEYLA RASHTI VS. EXPEDIA INC., A WHOLLY OWNED PARENT OF HOTEL.COM,

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00) SERVED DEC-18-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC., A WHOLLY OWNED PARENT OF HOTEL.COM, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC., A WHOLLY OWNED PARENT OF HOTEL.COM, LLC
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 1/16/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASHTI, SOHEYLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC., A WHOLLY OWNED PARENT OF HOTEL.COM, LLC HOTEL.COM'S TERMS OF SERVICE STATE THAT IT MAKES NO GUARANTEES ABOUT THE CONDITION OF HOTELS; IT IS MERELY A BOOKING AGENT. PLAINTIFF'S RECOURSE IS AGAINST THE HOTEL, NOT AGAINST THE BOOKING AGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY RASHTI, SOHEYLA AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC., A WHOLLY OWNED PARENT OF HOTEL.COM, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF SOHEYLA RASHTI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC. A WHOLLY OWNED PARENT OF HOTEL.COM IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MEGAN CAST MARKET MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
